title: More Bookshelves Variants
description: Bookshelves for all the different woods
body:

[![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/requires-quad.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad)

More Bookshelf Variants adds new bookshelves for all the wood types.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/twjW6Ggd/images/a300ba1e540bbdcb46469c4334f9c385e4f8f009.png)

Features include:
- Powering Enchanting Tables
- Burning with fire (exluding Nether wood types)

And Quad support, with:
- Furnace fuel (exluding Nether wood types)
- Nether wood fire immunity

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/strip/lol.png)

[**![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/banners/bisect-banner-spruce-chest.png)**](https://bisect.lieonlion.dev)
